calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William Michael Quinn, Jr., Esq., Senior Deputy General Counsel, Tel: 415.241.6054, appearing for respondent and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no objection, the court adopted the tentative ruling in its entirety.
PETITIONER UNITED ADMINISTRATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is denied.

(See word minutes for the court's complete ruling.)

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Continued To Aug-05-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER UNITED ADMINISTRATORS OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is continued on the Court's own motion to August 5, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 302. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported (302/EPS)
